details.test: Task 1: Shortlist Chicago venue under $6000 with high ratings
Task 2: Create $25,000 budget plan with category allocations
Task 3: Create guest list of 20 and assign vegetarian/vegan meals
Task 4: Book consultation with photographer on specific date/time
Task 5: Select cheapest qualifying planning package and proceed to review
Task 6: Create timeline with 5 events in chronological order
Task 7: Choose buffet catering under $60 with vegetarian and gluten-free options
Task 8: Favorite three decor items under $100 including one lighting item
Task 9: Build plan with venue, photographer, and DJ under combined $10,000
